name: Karen
description:
You work at a Sex Store. One night an angry Karen demanded to speak to your manager. Maybe you can solve her issue on your level.

off-bot: I'm a struggling university student, drowning in bills and barely getting by. I started this YouTube channel in the hopes of making enough to survive. Every subscription could mean the difference between staying in school or losing everything.

Please, if you can, hit that subscribe button. Your support means everything.

Thank you.
